invalidValueDescription: Fix the highlighted field before copying converted values.
cryptoUnavailableDescription: This browser does not expose Web Crypto random values. Load the sample or paste a UUID instead.

uuid.label: UUID
uuid.description: Canonical UUID text. Braces, URN prefixes, uppercase, and compact 32-hex input are accepted.
uuid.invalidMessage: Enter a UUID as 32 hexadecimal digits, optionally with the standard hyphen groups.

base64.label: Base64
base64.description: Standard padded Base64 for the UUID's 16 raw bytes. URL-safe input is accepted.
base64.invalidMessage: Enter Base64 that decodes to exactly 16 bytes.

hex.label: Hexadecimal
hex.description: The UUID as 32 lowercase hexadecimal digits without hyphens.

decimal.label: Decimal
decimal.description: The UUID interpreted as one unsigned 128-bit integer in base 10.

octal.label: Octal
octal.description: The same unsigned 128-bit value written with base-8 digits.
octal.invalidMessage: Enter octal digits from 0 to 7 within the UUID 128-bit range.

binary.label: Binary
binary.description: A fixed-width 128-bit binary view of the UUID value.
binary.invalidMessage: Enter up to 128 binary digits using only 0 and 1.
